overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 exploring a desert shantytown built against a massive Petrochem industrial wall. The player walks through makeshift structures and dirt paths with a distant neon city skyline visible, showcasing a dystopian contrast between poverty and corporate infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial shantytown at base of massive corporate wall

events.description: camera pans left revealing the massive curved Petrochem wall dominating the background

agents.ego_description: panning left and walking slowly to take in the scale of the industrial wall and surrounding shantytown structures

entered.detail: blue concrete building with large yellow 'Dope' graffiti and circuit patterns
massive curved concrete retaining wall with Petrochem corporate logo painted across the surface
striped concrete barriers blocking off areas in the foreground
makeshift corrugated metal and concrete structures built against the base of the wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens focused on a blue building with prominent yellow 'Dope' graffiti. As the camera pans left, the massive Petrochem wall is revealed - a towering curved structure that dominates the horizon. The environment is a dusty shantytown with scattered barriers and makeshift structures built against the corporate wall, bathed in harsh midday sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow shantytown passage with rocky hillside backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking through the settlement passing by NPCs and makeshift structures near the rocky hillside

notable_agents.action: two people standing and conversing near a blue door of a concrete building

entered.detail: large red rock formation rising steeply behind the shantytown buildings
multi-story gray concrete structure with external staircases and air conditioning units
metal barrel with active fire burning inside, emitting smoke

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the shantytown, the camera passes concrete residential structures with external staircases. A large rocky cliff rises behind the settlement, creating a natural backdrop. Two NPCs stand conversing near a blue door, while a burning barrel smokes nearby. The Petrochem wall fades from view as the camera moves through the narrow passages.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt road leading toward distant metropolis with underpass

events.description: camera begins following an NPC in a green jacket walking down the road toward the city

agents.ego_description: walking down the dirt road toward the city skyline, following an NPC and passing various debris and barriers

notable_agents.action: person in green jacket and colorful shorts walking ahead down the road toward the underpass

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers and holographic advertisements visible through the haze in the distance
concrete bridge or tunnel entrance leading toward the downtown area
rusted brown van parked on the side of the dirt road
numerous electrical cables stretching across the road between buildings

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto a wide dirt road leading toward a distant futuristic city skyline visible through the haze. The camera follows an NPC in a green jacket walking ahead. An abandoned rusted van sits on the roadside, while red and white barriers line the path. Overhead, power lines crisscross between the remaining structures, and an underpass looms in the distance leading toward the metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from the oppressive shadow of a corporate industrial wall into the open, hazy expanse of a desert shantytown leading toward a distant metropolis. It begins focused on a blue building marked with yellow graffiti before panning left to reveal the towering, curved Petrochem wall dominating the sun-drenched horizon. As the camera moves deeper into the settlement, the massive wall fades from view, replaced by concrete residential structures with external staircases and a looming rocky cliff. The scene then opens from these narrow passages onto a wide dirt road, passing a smoking barrel and a rusted van while following an NPC in a green jacket. Finally, the perspective expands across a landscape of crisscrossing power lines and red-and-white barriers, heading toward a distant underpass and the shimmering futuristic skyline visible through the haze.
